'''鈭歱-z-sh''' ('''kapazash''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:brawn|brawn]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-z-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:brawn|brawn]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歱-z-sh
|-
! Lemma
| kapazash
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thipazash|thipazash]] || [[word:jipazash|jipazash]] || [[word:shipazash|shipazash]] || [[word:kipazash|kipazash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthupazash|thuthupazash]] || [[word:jujupazash|jujupazash]] || [[word:shushupazash|shushupazash]] || [[word:kukupazash|kukupazash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thupazash|thupazash]] || [[word:jupazash|jupazash]] || [[word:shupazash|shupazash]] || [[word:kupazash|kupazash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thupazash|thupazash]] || [[word:jupazash|jupazash]] || [[word:shupazash|shupazash]] || [[word:kupazash|kupazash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thepazash|thepazash]] || [[word:jepazash|jepazash]] || [[word:shepazash|shepazash]] || [[word:kepazash|kepazash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothopazash|thothopazash]] || [[word:jojopazash|jojopazash]] || [[word:shoshopazash|shoshopazash]] || [[word:kokopazash|kokopazash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thopazash|thopazash]] || [[word:jopazash|jopazash]] || [[word:shopazash|shopazash]] || [[word:kopazash|kopazash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thopazash|thopazash]] || [[word:jopazash|jopazash]] || [[word:shopazash|shopazash]] || [[word:kopazash|kopazash]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:pazash|pazash]] || [[word:pazash|pazash]] || [[word:pazash|pazash]] || [[word:pazash|pazash]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:pazash|pazash]] || [[word:pazash|pazash]] || [[word:pazash|pazash]] || [[word:pazash|pazash]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:pazash|pazash]] || [[word:pazash|pazash]] || [[word:pazash|pazash]] || [[word:pazash|pazash]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:pazash|pazash]] || [[word:pazash|pazash]] || [[word:pazash|pazash]] || [[word:pazash|pazash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙pazash|th忙pazash]] || [[word:j忙pazash|j忙pazash]] || [[word:sh忙pazash|sh忙pazash]] || [[word:k忙pazash|k忙pazash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathapazash|thathapazash]] || [[word:jajapazash|jajapazash]] || [[word:shashapazash|shashapazash]] || [[word:kakapazash|kakapazash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thapazash|thapazash]] || [[word:japazash|japazash]] || [[word:shapazash|shapazash]] || [[word:kapazash|kapazash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thapazash|thapazash]] || [[word:japazash|japazash]] || [[word:shapazash|shapazash]] || [[word:kapazash|kapazash]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shapazash|shapazash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshapazash|goshapazash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishapazash|gokishapazash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shapazashn眉|shapazashn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshapazashnkn眉|goshapazashnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishapazashn眉|gokishapazashn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shapazashsh毛|shapazashsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshapazashnksh毛|goshapazashnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishapazashsh毛|gokishapazashsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapazashro|shapazashro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapazashnkro|goshapazashnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapazashro|gokishapazashro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shapazashmu|shapazashmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapazashnkmu|goshapazashnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapazashmu|gokishapazashmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shapazashsher|shapazashsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshapazashnksher|goshapazashnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishapazashsher|gokishapazashsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shapazashng|shapazashng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshapazashnkng|goshapazashnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishapazashng|gokishapazashng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shapazashya|shapazashya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshapazashnkya|goshapazashnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishapazashya|gokishapazashya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shapazashyam|shapazashyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshapazashnkyam|goshapazashnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishapazashyam|gokishapazashyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapazashn眉sh毛|shapazashn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapazashnkn眉sh毛|goshapazashnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapazashn眉sh毛|gokishapazashn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapazashn眉ro|shapazashn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapazashnkn眉ro|goshapazashnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapazashn眉ro|gokishapazashn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapazashn眉mu|shapazashn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapazashnkn眉mu|goshapazashnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapazashn眉mu|gokishapazashn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapazashsh毛n眉|shapazashsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapazashnksh毛n眉|goshapazashnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapazashsh毛n眉|gokishapazashsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapazashsh毛ro|shapazashsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapazashnksh毛ro|goshapazashnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapazashsh毛ro|gokishapazashsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapazashsh毛mu|shapazashsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapazashnksh毛mu|goshapazashnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapazashsh毛mu|gokishapazashsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapazashron眉|shapazashron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapazashnkron眉|goshapazashnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapazashron眉|gokishapazashron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapazashrosh毛|shapazashrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapazashnkrosh毛|goshapazashnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapazashrosh毛|gokishapazashrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapazashromu|shapazashromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapazashnkromu|goshapazashnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapazashromu|gokishapazashromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapazashmun眉|shapazashmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapazashnkmun眉|goshapazashnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapazashmun眉|gokishapazashmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapazashmush毛|shapazashmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapazashnkmush毛|goshapazashnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapazashmush毛|gokishapazashmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapazashmuro|shapazashmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapazashnkmuro|goshapazashnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapazashmuro|gokishapazashmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|eda3f80}}
